About Gold Coast Fence Inc.

12+ years serving Long Beach and surrounding areas

Gold Coast Fence Inc. started with a simple mission: to provide Long Beach and the surrounding areas with reliable, high-quality fencing solutions. We're a family-owned business, deeply invested in the community and committed to exceeding expectations.

Our approach is straightforward. We listen to your needs, assess your property, and recommend the best fencing options for your style and budget. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and meticulous workmanship.

We're proud to call Long Beach home and dedicated to giving back. We actively support local initiatives and prioritize sustainable practices, ensuring our work enhances the beauty and security of our neighborhoods for years to come.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Gold Coast Fence Inc.

Trusted fence company professionals serving Long Beach, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
